pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 7, used consistently throughout all scripts
setup_task.sh line 41 creates directory structure, confirmed by package path usage in all model Java files

Code analysis of setup_task.sh generated test files: OrderTest (3 tests: testSubtotal, testTotalWithDiscount_GoldTier, testTotalWithDiscount_CodeAndTier) + CustomerTest (1 test: testDisplayName) + DiscountServiceTest (2 tests: testCalculateDiscount_Silver, testCalculateDiscount_NoDiscount) + FormattingServiceTest (2 tests: testFormatFullName, testFormatEmail). Total = 3 + 1 + 2 + 2 = 8
export_result.sh line 50 defines FORBIDDEN_IMPORT, verifier.py checks for absence of this pattern in model package imports

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Java refactoring task for an 'order-management' Maven project. The project contains deliberate circular dependencies: Order.java imports DiscountService and Customer.java imports FormattingService from the service package. The task requires 8 unit tests to pass: 3 OrderTest tests, 1 CustomerTest test, 2 DiscountServiceTest tests, and 2 FormattingServiceTest tests. The core success criterion is eliminating all imports of 'com.example.order.service' from the model package (located at src/main/java/com/example/order/model), while maintaining functionality verified by the passing tests and successful Maven compilation.
